Going the Extra Mile

DRIVE YOUR BUSINESS
WITH CONNECTIVITY

Steering so advanced, you'll never go back

OUR MODELS

MODELS
SEGMENTS

QUON

Powerful yet fuel-efficient, with superior drivability, braking, and comfort. Quon prioritizes people, cargo and your business.

Learn more

QUESTER

A versatile heavy-duty truck that combines fuel efficiency with durability. It is made to overcome any challenges.

Learn more

CRONER

Configurable to meet your needs, Croner embodies truck efficiency and safety.

Learn more

CONDOR

Comfortable operability and reliability for every driver. 

Learn more

KUZER

A nimble workhorse that strives in narrow urban roads, Kuzer boast the largest cab in its class.

Learn more

KAZET

Equipped with driver-focused cabin and advanced safety features, the Kazet offers ultimate dependability. 

Learn more
